rationale: F02 Full-Color Poster escolhida por compatibilidade ideal com o produto e mood evening_riverside. Cloud Dance é sofisticado, ethereal, cream-foam delicate — pede composição editorial-premium com hero isolado sobre fundo flat ou subtly warm. F02 permite hero respirar e tipografia dominar bottom-third. Mood evening_riverside alinha com visual_dna warm-amber + cocoa-brown.

designer_brief.subject: Coupe glass cocktail with silky egg white foam top, single pear slice on rim
ingredients_outside: vanilla pod leaning against glass base
pear peel ribbon spiral on deck
designer_brief.lighting: warm directional from upper-right, dramatic chiaroscuro, golden hour spill on cream foam
designer_brief.background: flat cocoa-brown (#6B4A2D Madeira Queimada) or warm-amber gradient subtle, motion-friendly per FAM-F03-01 logic adapted
designer_brief.negative_prompt: no mint, no thyme, no rosemary, no cinnamon stick inside glass, no high saturation neon, no abstract shapes, no textured wood deck (keep flat bg), no busy patterns competing with hero

vision_critique_brief: F02 evening_riverside Cloud Dance. Coupe glass com egg white foam delicado, pear slice no rim. Verificar: garnish nunca dentro do copo (warning mint/thyme/rosemary/cinnamon do produto), tipografia 3 camadas Blueprint (Display off-white 140px · Accent dourado italic 46px · Info tracked caps), contraste WCAG AA off-white sobre overlay cocoa-brown, hero subject lower-third (center 55%), selo Ritual Só Rio creme (não dourado — hero tem warm-amber dominante, creme traz warmth contraste per COLOR-02), overlay_strength 1.1 (hero bottom médio per COLOR-01), fundo flat cocoa-brown ou warm-amber gradient sem textura wood deck (motion-friendly per adaptação FAM-F03-01). Cloud Dance precisa de respirar — restraint total.
